business_ideas.idea: Val's real estate portfolio business, 150-200M revenue, fully bootstrapped.
Humanoid robot company (Figure AI) needing $1T to change the world.
Offshore talent hiring platform (Shepherd) supporting business growth.
Founder peer community (Hampton) for $1M+ revenue entrepreneurs.
Acquire existing profitable businesses and optimize via marketing.
Angel investing in growing startups with added marketing support.
Immigration services (bring engineers/lawyers from Turkey to USA).

predictions.text: Humanoid robots will be bigger industry than Tesla.
Acquiring good businesses and adding marketing delivers 10x+ returns.
Angel investing in growing portfolio companies beats venture returns.
